description_long: This is a tall, slender bottle with a dark, glossy screw cap and a long neck, typical of bottles used for alcoholic beverages such as wine or spirits. The main body is cylindrical and features a dark, richly colored label with gold and green decorative elements, as well as some visible text and branding. The bottle appears to be made of glass, with a smooth and reflective surface, and the label wraps around the midsection. The cap is black with gold accents and a small emblem or logo on the top. The bottle's color is a muted brownish hue, likely due to the glass tint or the contents inside. There are no visible signs of damage, and the overall appearance is clean and well-maintained.
description: A tall, slender glass bottle with a dark screw cap and a decorative label featuring gold and green accents. The bottle has a smooth, glossy surface and a muted brownish tint.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label with prominent text and decorative gold and green elements.
description_view_1: Side view with the label partially visible, showing more of the bottle's cylindrical shape and less text.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back label, which appears to have smaller text and less decoration.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the label partially visible, similar to view 1 but from the other side.
attribute_label_or_branding: The bottle features a dark label with gold and green decorative elements and visible text, including a prominent brand name in gold. The cap also has a gold emblem or logo on a black background.
